title: Shuwthelach #7803
definition:
Shuthelah = "noise of breaking"

 1) son of Ephraim, ancestor of Joshua, and progenitor of family
    of Ephraim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shuthelah = "noise of breaking"

 1) son of Ephraim, ancestor of Joshua, and progenitor of family
    of Ephraim

    NASB:  an Ephraimite name
